task_description: Design and implement a Python class for a simple validation framework that can validate data against a schema with custom rules.

requirements: Schema(definition) - Create a schema from a dict definition
validate(data) - Validate data against the schema, return ValidationResult
Support field types: string, int, float, bool, list, dict, email, url
Support constraints: required, min_length, max_length, min_value, max_value, pattern (regex)
Support custom validation rules via register_rule(name, fn)
ValidationResult should have: is_valid, errors (list of {field, message, rule})
Support partial validation (validate only specified fields)
constraints: Support for default values in schema
Raise SchemaError for invalid schema definitions
Type coercion should be optional (strict mode vs lenient mode)
